titleStmt.title: SII 15.97: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 97. (B.K. No. 104 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying on the proper right side of the Mallikārjuna temple.
This is dated Śaka 1080, Bahudhānya, Vaiśākha-puṇṇami, Monday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1158 A.D., April 14, Monday, f.d.t. °47. The eclipse occurred, however, on Tuesday.

It records the renewal by the king of the gift of the village Nāgahura in the kaṁpaṇa of Herbbāḷu Twelve to the god Śivaliṅga of Muttage, formerly bestowed by Chālukya Jagadēkamalla II. The gift was now renewed at the instance of Śrīdharadaṇḍanātha governing Tarddavāḍi-nāḍu and entrusted into the hands of the teacher Lakuḷīśa, the āchārya of the temple. The succession of these teachers is given as follows: Kāśmīradēva, his disciple Kālabhairava, his disciple Yōgīśvara; his disciple Dharēśvaradēva; and his disciple Yōgīśvaradēva, the guru of Lakuḷīśa. Muttage is described as an excellent agrahāra and the first town in the kaṁpaṇa of Muttage Thirty in the Tarddavāḍi-nāḍu. The record gives the genealogy of Śrīdhara-daṇḍanātha. It also records other gifts to the same deity by the Karaṇas of the above officer and Nāchiseṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . © svasti śrīmadaśēṣalōka
pradaṁ jñānavinyāsaṁ bhāsuranityanirmmaḷaparaṁjyōtisvarūpaṁ śivaṁ śasta śrī śivaliṁ nacaḷaṁ raṁji prastutyaṁ paripāḷikī bhuvana
maṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ . śrīstanakuṁkumāruṇita raṁjitaśōṇamaṇiprabhāḷiyiṁ kaustubhamiṁdranīḷagiri dēvāḷi nēsaraṁ diṁde vakṣadoḷu ra
kṣipanaśēṣalōkapāḷastutya rakṣisugaśēṣajagaṁgaḷanella kēśavaṁ . śrīmattējōnidhānaṁ vimaḷataraparaṁjōtitatvasvarūpaṁ traimūrtti jñānamūrtti
tānaṁdamūrtti triḷōkasvāmi pratyakṣadaivaṁ divijagaṇanutaṁ viśvalōkaika nētraṁ byōmāḷaṁkāranutsāhamanakhiḷajagakkīge paṁkējamitraṁ .
śrīkaḷacuriyāṁnvayaratnākarasaṁvriddhikarasamudgatapūrnnasudhākarabiṁbaṁ negaḷdaṁ lōkaikastutyanenisi permmāḍinripāḷakaṁ . śrī kaḷacuryyavaṁśatiḷekaṁ
permmāḍidēvaṁ dharitrige rakṣārtthade sākṣaradhvajane baṁdirpaṁtirirdaṁ suvarṇagavēṁdra dhvajanīdharāvaḷayamaṁ kāruṇyadiṁ pāḷisutta gajēṁdrāri parākramaṁ jananutaṁ śrī mā
na hēmācaḷaṁ . mahēśana ghōrānanadalli daḷḷisuṁ vugrābhīḷa lalāṭalōcanadurudgatamādudaṁtene
hermmāḍidēvaṁge naṁdananī bijjaḷadēvanūrjjitayaśaṁ vairībhakaṁṭhīravaṁ baḷavadarā� vaṁśamahōdadhibhūmi kṣubhi
vanadahanadāvānaḷaṁ bijjalanṛpana rāmanoḷ . viśvadharitriyo
ḷaga baḷadibyāśvacayaṁgaḷaṁ madagajabrajamaṁ maṇibhūṣaṇaṁgaḷaṁ sāsvatamappa laṁkēśvarabhūbhuja
rpparu . vijita virōdhi dōrbbaḷadesagaṁ raṁga doḷāṁtarātibhūbhuja diśāgajanivahaṁbaraṁ nimi
doṁdagurbbiniṁ bhujabhaḷacakravarttivesaraṁ taḷedaṁ pratipakṣarākṣasaṁ . Enenegaḷdā bijjaladē guṇaniḷayaṁ sejjanakarnna
pūranē sale manucaritaṁ śrīdharaṁ mahīdharadhairyyaṁ . Ene saṁda paramadharmmajñāna vipradēva mahimōṁnatiyeṁtene viśvarūpadiṁdaṁ vanajākṣaṁ tāne bijjaḷa
rūpāgi [niṁdaṁ .] śrīramaṇana nābhiya paṁkēruha caturmmukhanīrēḷujagamanartthiyiṁ paḍevaṁdu . muṁba
najamanadiṁ marīci kramadiṁ kaśyapamunīśa nanā negaḷdhirdda kaśyapaṁ tāṁ paḍedī jagatrayamanādaradiṁ parirakṣisalke petta paru
taraṁ . Ā gaṇaṁgaḷoḷādi brahmana guṇaratnanidhivāk śrīdayitaṁ
negaḷdaṁ . Ā vibhuvina kulavadhu vākśrīvadhugaṁ dharaṇisutegaruṁdhatigaṁ śrī cāvuṁḍakabbe saṁmanade vasumati pogaḷe negaḷdaḷamaḷacaritre . negaḷdādaṁpatigaṁ
baṁdhubrātatūsaṁmige mitrarnnaliyuttiral budhajanakkānaṁdemāgal spuṭaṁ jagatīcakradoḷāge sejjana puṭṭe vaṁdibrajaṁ
bagegoṁḍarttiyināḍi pāḍi parasalgaṁgādharaṁ puṭṭidaṁ . naḍe manumārggadoḷu deyānvitamopperaḍargge bēḷpudaṁ kuḍuva balpu taṁna maṟevokka
parōpakāramakhiḷajñate tatpaṁga mādudeṁdaḍe vibhugaṁga naṁneṟeye baṇniparārvvimaḷāṁtaraṁganaṁ . Ī dhare baṇni salse gaḷda vautādgalagō
trapavitranappa gaṁgādharadaṁḍanāthana kulāṁgane jahnavidēviyaṁte puṇyādhike saccaritre bahuputra sunirmmaḷe jakkiyabbe vidyādharakaṁneyiṁ kara mecce
ne yaruṁdhativōl patibrate . puruṣārtthada kaṇi gaṁgādharavibhugaṁ jakkiyabbegaṁ sutarā daru puruṣārtthaṁgaḷe nālkuṁ nararūpaṁ taḷedu niṁdaṁnte vasumatiyoḷ .
mudadiṁ dharmmame mūrttivettudenipaṁ śrī padmanābhaṁ jagadviditaṁ śrīdharadēvanujva ḷayeśaṁ śrīmanmahādēvanabhyudayānaṁdakaraṁ jagajjananutaṁ śrī ciṁdadēvaṁ guṇāspadaruṁ
nālvarumādarīkramadinā geṁgādharaṁgātmajar . padmaṁ sadamaḷa lakṣmīsadmaṁ mitra praharṣaṁ padmōdbhavakuḷamānasapadma śrī padmanābhanapagatalōbhaṁ nayana
trayadiṁ gaurīpriyanesevantesayutirdda trayadiṁdaṁ padmanābhadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . tadanujana vāryyavīryyaṁ sadamaḷaguṇaratna
bhūṣaṇaṁ sakaḷakaḷāspadanesedanakhiḷalakṣmīsadanaṁ śrīdharacamūpananupamarūpaṁ . piriyaṁ saubhāgyadiṁ sāhasadi yiṁ saṁda gōviṁdanallaṁ piriyaṁ sāmartthya
diṁ vikramadinanupamaudāryyadiṁ sauryyadiṁdaṁ paramaisvaryyaprabhāvaṁ nijamenippā mahādēvanalliṁ piriyaṁ śrīsrīdharaṁ bhāsuraviśadayaśaṁ vi
pravidyādharēṁdraṁ . Avanīcakrakke bhāsvadyumaṇi kuvaḷayānaṁda viśrutamati bhūmige śrēṣṭhanā bhārggavaniṁ śastrapravīṇaṁ
yamaniyama parā rāji nityōtsavaniṁdradhvajaṁ śrīdharane negaḷdaṁ vipra vaṁśābja haṁsaṁ . śāstrasakaḷāgama
kṛtiyoḷe śrīvāgdēvīpati di�diṁ śrīdharayyadaṁḍādhīsaṁ . pa�bhaktaṁ [�ci]dakṣanene kāruṇyadiṁ bi�lakṣiti�ḷaṁkuḍe pe�ttukuṁtaḷa�
kāṁtālasanmadhyasaṁsthitamappī vara tarddavāḍiyananituṁ pāḷisutirddanapratimaṁ śrīdhara daṁḍanāthanavanīcakraṁ manaṁgoḷvinaṁ . © Ā nāḍaṁ duṣṭanigra
ha śiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ geyyutta dharmmatatparacittenāgi © svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmat pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvar tardde vāḍināḍa baḷiya kaṁpaṇa muttage māvattara modalabāḍaṁ śrīmadu
ttamadagrahāraṁ muttageya śrī śivaliṁgadēvargge Ā nāḍa baḷiya kaṁpaṇaṁ herbbāḷu haṁnaraḍaṟoḷagaṇa nāgahuramuṁ kuḍalu dēvarāḷkeyāgi saluttire
© śrīmatkaḷacurya bhujabaḷacakravartti tribhuvanamalla birjjaladēvargge suprastāva doḷ śrīdharadaṁḍanāyakaṁ samastakaraṇaṁgaḷuṁ verasu biṁnapaṁgeydu Ā
nāgahuramaṁ muttageyumī śrī śivaliṁgadēvargge punarddattiyoge sarbbanamasyavāgire tribhōgābhyaṁtarasiddhiyiṁ paḍedu . © svasti sakavarṣada 1080 neya ba
hudhānya saṁvatsarada vaiśākhada puṇnami sōmavāradaṁdina sōmagrahaṇa byatīpāta parbbanimittaṁ nāgahuramaṁ śrīśivaliṁgadēvargge nivēdisi dēvaraṁga
bhōga naṁdādīvige nivēdya tapōdhanara ccātraraśanācchādana dēgulada maṭhada khaṁḍa sphuṭita navakarmma ghaḷayūraṁ caitraṁ pavitraṁ pātrapāvuḷaṁga
ḷācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ salalu . Āsthānadācāryyarpparamanaiṣṭhikaru śrīmat kāśmīra dēvara śiṣyaru vādimahāpraḷaya kālabhairava dēvaru .
Avara śiṣyaru yōgīśvaradēvaru . Avara śiṣyaru dharēsvaradēvaru . Avara śiṣyaru yōgī śvaradēvaru . Avara śiṣyaru . vri . sakaḷajñaṁ śivatatvavēdi manu
mādaṁtana cāritradiṁ sakaḷōrbbī vaḷayaṁ pavitrataremāyteṁbaṁnegaṁ mikka naiṣṭhikacūḍā maṇi lākuḷāgama sudhāṁbhōrāśitārādhipaṁ lakuḷīśabra
tiyeṁdu baṇnipudiḷābhāgaṁ manōrāgadiṁ . Eṁba hogartteyaṁ taḷedu . svasti yama niyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāna japasamādhiśīla saṁpanarappa .
śrīlakuḷīśapadaprakṣālanamaṁ māḍida keyiṁ taṁnaya kai mēlāge dhāreyeredaṁ līleyinī śrīdharayya daṁḍādhīśaṁ . śrīdharadaṁḍanāthanatibhaktisamanvita
cittanāgi nirbbādhakamāge nāgahuramaṁ sale sarbbanamasyamāgiralkī dhare baṇnipaṁttu śivaliṁga mahāmahimaṁge koṭṭanaṁbōdhi ravīṁdu bhūvaḷayamuḷḷinegaṁ sthiramāge rā
gadiṁ . śivadharmmame dharmmaṁ śrī śivaliṁga meṁdu karṇaṁgaḷumutsavadiṁde nāga huramaṁ bhuvanajanaṁ hogaḷe bhaktipūrbbakamittar . paramōtsāhadeThe letter va is written above the line.
bhaktipūrvvakadinittarggāṇavoṁdaṁ dayāpararatyūrjjitapuṇyarujvaḷayaśarssāhitya sarvvajñarādaradiṁ śrīdharadēva mukhyakaraṇaṁgaḷ rājyadṛṣṭisvarūparu
mī yūroḍeyarmmahājanamumācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ salal . Āryyarnnispriharacaḷita dhairyyarpparamārtthatatvavidaranupamavāgvīrya rnaiṣṭhikarani
pācāryyartāmā ḷkumī sthānakke . dharaṇīvallabharuṁ pradhānapuruṣarddaṁḍā dhiparnnāḍanāḷvaraserpperggaḍegaḷ samastakaraṇaṁgaḷnāḍugaḷmattamī puradādi
prabhugaḷmahājanamumāraideṁdumī dharmmamaṁ paripāḷippudu taṁmma dharmmamidmutāṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnripāṇāṁ
kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarā
dibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhūmitasya tasya tadāphalaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
śrī girijēśvaraṁge śivaliṁga mahāmahimaṁge bhaktiyiṁ nāgahurakke baṁdu tanagikkuva bīre vaṇaṁ niraṁtaraṁ tyāgamideṁdu koṭṭanuditō
ditakīrttiya nāciseṭṭi bhūbhāgadoḷiṁ niṁdaṁ pogaḷvaḍeṁtenali bakkumē . [Ī hu]radalli haḍuvaṇa bhāga dikka
ḷikeya holadiṁdaṁ mūḍalu bhāgavāgi sīmeya bāgiṁ teṁka dvijōttamavrittiyakeygaḷ .
Digital edition of SII 15.97 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
